instruction: The Dublin release setup needs a cleanup pass. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale sync, refresh the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.
canonical_instruction: I need the Dublin release setup cleaned up. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale sync, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.
instruction_variants: Something's off in the Dublin release setup. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale sync, update the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.

The Dublin release setup has something stale in it. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale sync, refresh the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.

I need the Dublin release setup back in shape. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale sync, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.

solution_commands: file create --path '/ops/release-handoff.txt' --content 'Dublin refreshed release handoff notes.'
